ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building (e.g., city, state) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the building */,
  "building_size" REAL /* Total square footage of the building */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last building inspection */,
  "maintenance_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for building maintenance */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, CO2, humidity) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor within the building */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the reading */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the reading (e.g., °C, ppm, %) */,
  "source_device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device that collected the reading (e.g., BMS device) */,
  "alert_triggered" INTEGER /* Whether this reading triggered an alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hvac_systems" (
  "hvac_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HVAC system */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the HVAC system is installed */,
  "hvac_type" TEXT /* Type of HVAC system (e.g., heating, cooling, ventilation) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the HVAC system */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the HVAC system was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the HVAC system */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the HVAC system */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the HVAC system */,
  "energy_efficiency" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating (e.g., SEER, EER) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hvac_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hvac_systems_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the threshold is set */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., temperature, CO2) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "alert_recipient" TEXT /* Email or contact information of the person to notify */,
  "alert_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the threshold that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was resolved */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES thresholds ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., facility manager, maintenance staff, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., energy consumption, air quality) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_date FOREIGN KEY ("report_date") REFERENCES readings ("reading_time")
)

CREATE TABLE "bms" (
  "bms_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BMS */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the BMS is installed */,
  "bms_type" TEXT /* Type of BMS (e.g., HVAC, lighting, security) */,
  "bms_version" TEXT /* Version of the BMS */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the BMS was installed */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "next_update" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled update */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the BMS */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the BMS */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the BMS */,
  "communication_protocol" TEXT /* Communication protocol used (e.g., BACnet, Modbus, MQTT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bms_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bms_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)
